analysis.consistency: High. The data structure is consistent with a typical D&D 5e spell entry. Terminology (e.g., 'Charmed', 'Frightened', 'Concentration') is standard.
analysis.quality: High. The description is detailed, clearly outlining the area of effect, saving throw mechanic (Charisma), and the two distinct options for effect resolution. The inclusion of conditions for resuming/ending suppressed effects is precise.

effects.reversal_mechanic: Effect resumes when spell ends, if duration remains.

effects.description: Make a target indifferent toward specified hostile creatures.
effects.reversal_mechanic: Ends immediately if the target or its friends are attacked or harmed by the spell; hostility resumes when spell ends, unless GM rules otherwise.

mechanics.level_and_school: Level 2, Enchantment (Appropriate for the listed classes: Bard, Cleric)

analysis.suggestions_for_improvement: None required. The data is clean and complete for archival purposes.
